headline: How Will Dow Jones Futures Open As Trump Mulls 'Winding Down' Iran War?
summary: The major indexes broke long-term support last week as oil prices and bond yields soar, but President Trump said late Friday he's mulling "winding down" the Iran war.

raw.headline: How Will Dow Jones Futures Open As Trump Mulls 'Winding Down' Iran War?
raw.summary: The major indexes broke long-term support last week as oil prices and bond yields soar, but President Trump said late Friday he's mulling "winding down" the Iran war.

headline: Dow Jones Bounces Late After Sell-Off As Trump Mulls 'Winding Down' Iran War
summary: The major indexes broke long-term support as oil prices and bond yields soar. President Trump said late Friday he's mulling "winding down" the Iran war hours after saying that was not "acceptable."

raw.headline: Dow Jones Bounces Late After Sell-Off As Trump Mulls 'Winding Down' Iran War
raw.summary: The major indexes broke long-term support as oil prices and bond yields soar. President Trump said late Friday he's mulling "winding down" the Iran war hours after saying that was not "acceptable."
